title: Application can integrate in monday.com and reports the hour to quickbooks
excerpt:
Hello, 
May i ask what application can integrate in monday.com and reports the hour to quickbooks? 
Thank you

posts.author: juliusbernandino (Julius Bernandino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
May i ask what application can integrate in monday.com and reports the hour to quickbooks?
Thank you

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@juliusbernandino ,

There are a few applications that can integrate with Monday.com and report hours to QuickBooks. Here are a few of them:

Dancing Numbers: This is a third-party integration that allows you to sync time entries from Monday.com to QuickBooks Online. It also allows you to create custom reports and track your time and expenses in one place.
Time Doctor: This is another third-party integration that allows you to track time spent on tasks and projects in Monday.com. It also allows you to generate reports that show how much time you’ve spent on each task, project, or client.
Hubstaff: This is a time tracking and productivity app that can integrate with Monday.com. It allows you to track time spent on tasks, projects, and clients, as well as generate reports on your productivity.
Toggl: This is a simple time tracking app that can also integrate with Monday.com. It allows you to track time spent on tasks, projects, and clients, as well as generate reports on your productivity.

For further implementation details kindly connect us:
MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: juliusbernandino (Julius Bernandino)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, Thank you for your immediate response.

posts.author: Workflow_Magic (Lydia Agopian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve set up a handful of clients workflows that integrates quickbooks time & monday.com. Specifically where they clock into quickbooks and the time is recorded in monday.com which then calculates number of hours work per project, profit margin, etc. If you are interested in this - I’m happy to give you a demo of what I’ve built for them.
Calendly - Lydia Agopian

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @juliusbernandino!

There are two different ways available for you to track and report hours. First, you can simply integrate monday .com with QuickBooks and Turn on “set up time tracking” in the QuickBooks Online version. Second, you can opt for third-party app integrations that allow you to sync time entries from monday .com to QuickBooks Online. This also allows you to build personalized reports and monitor time and expenses from a single dashboard. Either way, you can access timesheets from QuickBooks Online without any interruptions.

To know more about the list of third-party apps available for time tracking and reporting in monday.com QuickBooks integration, reach out to the dedicated experts from a monday .com consulting company. They can guide you throughout the integration process and provide proactive support.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
